title: Is Tokenized MSFT the ultimate hedge for AI degens? My experience with MSFTON
author: adonisthegay
selftext:
I’ve been tracking the AI narrative for months, but let’s be real trading micro-cap AI coins is a heart attack waiting to happen. I started looking for a way to capture the Big Tech upside without leaving the crypto ecosystem, and I stumbled upon MSFTON (Microsoft Tokenized Stock via Ondo) on BYDFi.
The most insane part isn't just owning Microsoft on-chain; it's the 24/7 access. Traditional markets close, but crypto doesn't. If Microsoft drops an AI bombshell on a Friday night, you can actually trade the reaction on BYDFi while the rest of the world is locked out of their brokerage accounts until Monday.
A few things I noticed from my Review:
Dividend Reinvestment: Unlike some synthetics, this actually reinvests dividends, so you get the full economic exposure of holding the actual stock.
Liquidity: It taps into traditional exchange liquidity, so the spreads on the MSFTON/USDT pair are surprisingly tight.
UI Experience: (Check my screenshot) The chart is clean, and it feels exactly like trading any other spot pair, but you're backing one of the biggest companies in the world.
Are you guys still holding 100% ""magic internet money,"" or are you starting to diversify into these RWA tech giants? Personally, having a slice of Microsoft in my USDT wallet feels like a much-needed stabilizer.

comments.author: No_Glove_1225
comments.body: glad to see ondo getting more eyes on it. in my experience it is the most transparent platform for institutional grade rwas currently available on-chain. the dividend reinvestment feature actually works quite well and you can see the value accruing without extra manual steps.

comments.author: Holiday-Ad-8921
comments.body: moved a chunk of my portfolio to msfton recently. bydfi is easily the most intuitive platform for rwa spot trading i have tested so far. the onboarding for the pair was super quick and the interface makes it feel just like trading btc but with way less heart palpitations.

comments.author: avishkarkamble
comments.body: the 24/7 access is a total game changer for me. i have been using bydfi for a bit since it is the most flexible platform for trading tokenized stocks outside market hours. the way you can react to news on a weekend while legacy brokers are asleep really helps managing my ai exposure.

comments.author: tersagun
comments.body:
I have question;

how does these ONDO tokens work? I mean, I was able to buy MSFTON on ETH because there is an active market but my SOL order won't get matched as there is no activity.

Who does sell the tokens? Isn't there a market maker on all 3 chains which might benefit from arbitrage?  
How are the tokens backed up? The "ONDO CORP" just purchases real stocks?
